purpose: Activate M7 skill (matching expressions to visuals) and personalize with callback language.
visual: Context Visualizations (Mode 2). Single visualization. Concrete context (boxes with items). [NEW] initialization. Multiple Choice interaction. Method A.
guide: "Last time, you matched expressions to equal groups like these. Let's see if you remember how."
student_action: Multiple Choice selection via Equation Builder Method A.
design_note: Changed visual ([NEW] state) to maintain engagement and avoid repetition. Uses different values (4×2) than opening hook (3×5 and 5×3).
guide_2: "Last time, you picked the right expression from choices. This time? YOU build them. Let's go."
design_note_2: Session-relative language ("last time/this time"), creates anticipation without teaching, previews what Lesson will deliver (building methods).
